data.content: The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler doesn't know about it. The target needs to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group so Roslyn picks it up.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file into the intermediate output directory, but it never adds that file to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild collects `Compile` items before `CoreCompile` runs, so the generated file exists on disk but the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group using `<ItemGroup>` with `<Compile Include="..." />` inside the target, after writing the file.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler sees it -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never added it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild collects items to compile before `CoreCompile` runs, so the compiler never saw the generated file.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="..." />` item inside the target (after writing the file) so the generated source is included in compilation.
